title: App crashes after OAuth callback
message: The app crashes after I complete OAuth. It looks like the token is missing from the callback response.

title: Feature request: Slack digest
message: Can you add support for a weekly Slack digest of unresolved high-risk cases?

title: Docs unclear for setup
message: The documentation does not explain how to configure the webhook secret. I spent an hour stuck on setup.

title: Urgent production bug
message: Critical bug: CSV import fails when customer messages contain commas. This blocks our weekly report.
